pr_text:
## Title: Fix out-of-bounds memory read in small block encoder

### Summary
The `encodeSmallBlock()` function reads beyond the bounds of the `nrSmallBlockBasis` array when the `len` parameter exceeds 11, causing undefined behavior and potential crashes. The statically defined `nrSmallBlockBasis` array contains only 11 elements (indices 0-10), but the function iterates from 0 to `len-1` without validating the input parameter. Call sites in the PHY layer (e.g., `pucch_nr.c`) pass the number of UCI
